message:
Optimize Range requests with batching and caching

- Add _batchIndices() to group nearby indices into contiguous ranges
- Batch readInt64AtIndices, readFloat64AtIndices, readStringsAtIndices
- Add column metadata and offset caching to avoid repeated fetches
- Add detectColumnTypes() for remote files with result caching
- Update executeRemoteQuery to use column-by-column batched fetching
- Show column types in UI for remote Lance files

Performance: ~20x fewer HTTP requests for typical queries
